children.label: A
children.text: the identity of the attorney in the Department of Justice making the application;

children.label: B
children.text: a certification by the Attorney General or the Deputy Attorney General that the application satisfies the criteria and requirements of this section;

children.label: C
children.text: the identity of the alien for whom authorization for the removal proceeding is sought; and

children.label: i
children.text: the alien is an alien terrorist;

children.label: ii
children.text: the alien is physically present in the United States; and

children.label: iii
children.text: with respect to such alien, removal under subchapter II would pose a risk to the national security of the United States.

children.heading: Filing
children.label: 2 Filing
children.text: An application under this section shall be submitted ex parte and in camera, and shall be filed under seal with the removal court.

children.heading: Right to dismiss
children.label: b Right to dismiss
children.text: The Attorney General may dismiss a removal action under this subchapter at any stage of the proceeding.

children.label: A
children.text: other information, including classified information, presented under oath or affirmation; and

children.label: B
children.text: testimony received in any hearing on the application, of which a verbatim record shall be kept.

children.label: A
children.text: the alien who is the subject of the application has been correctly identified and is an alien terrorist present in the United States; and

children.label: B
children.text: removal under subchapter II would pose a risk to the national security of the United States.

children.heading: Denial of order
children.label: 3 Denial of order
children.text: If the judge denies the order requested in the application, the judge shall prepare a written statement of the reasons for the denial, taking all necessary precautions not to disclose any classified information contained in the Government’s application.

children.heading: Exclusive provisions
children.label: d Exclusive provisions
children.text: If an order is issued under this section granting an application, the rights of the alien regarding removal and expulsion shall be governed solely by this subchapter, and except as they are specifically referenced in this subchapter, no other provisions of this chapter shall be applicable.
